name: @omar391/loopo
description: Deterministic V3 quest workflow CLI for Loopo launchers and runtime hooks.

scripts.cmdproto:schema: buf lint --config buf.yaml && mkdir -p assets/cmdproto && buf build --config buf.yaml proto --as-file-descriptor-set -o assets/cmdproto/schema.binpb && node ./node_modules/cmdproto/scripts/runtime-manifest.mjs --app-name loopo --schema assets/cmdproto/schema.binpb --out assets/cmdproto/runtime.binpb
scripts.verify: bun run scripts/verify_coherency.ts && bun run cmdproto:schema && bun run scripts/verify_cmdproto_abi.ts && bun run scripts/verify_quest_contract.ts && bun run scripts/verify_runtime_hooks.ts && bun run scripts/verify_runtime_simulation.ts && bun run scripts/verify_runtime_stepper.ts && bun run scripts/report_lifecycle_matrix.ts
